creator: des@ofug.org
text:
haro@kubota.co.jp writes:
> -inn2-*			ports/news/inn2		Copyright file in package
> +inn-2.*			ports/news/inn-stable	Copyright file in package
>  						Need to name Rich Salz (done
> -						in DESCR). Need to name changes
> -						done in inn2 sources, which are
> -						now maintained by ISC. Otherwise
> -						no usage restriction.
> +						in pkg-descr). Need to name
> +						changes done in inn2 sources,
> +						which are now maintained by ISC.
> +						Otherwise no usage restriction.

There are no restrictions on INN. It is under a four-clause BSD license,
and the requirement that binary distributions be accompanied by a copy
of the license is satisfied by ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inn/LICENSE.

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smorgrav - des@ofug.org
